title: saussurea japonica var. japonica
intro: Saussurea japonica var. japonica, also known as Japanese costus root or Japanese saussurea, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Saussurea japonica var. japonica include relieving arthritis, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, it is used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
